sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: strong misc-category fit. coffee is still fundamentally judged by effects and use-case rather than nutrient composition. strong alertness effect. this is the main real-world reason coffee matters in this category. usually near-zero calories plain. very clean base use-case when not loaded with extras.

sections.subtitleText: the upsides first: strong misc-category fit. coffee is still fundamentally judged by effects and use-case rather than nutrient composition. strong alertness effect. this is the main real-world reason coffee matters in this category. usually near-zero calories plain. very clean base use-case when not loaded with extras.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: caffeine tradeoffs are real. sleep disruption, jitters, and overuse risk stop this from being a clean automatic S. habit dependence can creep in. a stronger practical downside than green tea usually carries. people often ruin it with sugary add-ins. the practical version consumed is not always the clean black-coffee version.

closing.summary: Coffee does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
